author: Joan Rayborn
review: Came within 2 hours for  a non-emergency problem. My kitchen  sink was not draining. Ole fixed it immediately, and cleaned up the mess. He was so polite and friendly. It is great to have him as our caretaker. So glad he is back!

author: Alan Krum
review: It is a SHAG property (Seattle centric corp mindset) I have lived here 3 years and want to move. Enough said.

author: American Classic
review: Tv rooms close during prime time shows 9 pm on, so unless you pay $160-$200 a month in cable/I internet you miss a lot by media rooms closing so early. They could leave the library open all night for night owls and prime time tv. Tho,

ownerResponse.text: Hello, we are happy to see that your experience has been a positive one! The team here at Woodrose Senior Affordable Apartments is always available for any assistance that you may need. Thank you for taking the time to leave us your rating!

author: Steven Perry
review: UPDATE: Contacted the main office and they were able to work with my grandma to get her down from the top floor. Very kind and worked with us to quickly remedy the situation. Thank you very much Woodrose Apartments.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Steven,Thank you for the review! We absolutely agree that the top floors can get very warm during the Summer months in our communities without A/C. I can assure you it wasn't much better on the lower levels during this recent heat wave. There are some things we can do to assist. Please contact the office so that we can help remedy the situation. Thank you again!

author: Jackson Bold
review:
Ok place
Just not for me
Thank you
Jackson Bold

ownerResponse.text: Our team strives to deliver an excellent experience, and are glad you found this to be the case during your visit. If you have further needs or questions, please reach out! We're glad to hear we delivered such a great experience. If there's anything further we can do for you, we are happy to help! Thank you for letting our team know how we did! We look forward to helping again in the future.

author: Hal McFarland
review: 2 years in and Im still happy with my choice. Fair Field management is very responsive to all maintenance issues, residents are like a very caring family, and its nice to live in a quiet community

author: Susan Haase
review: The buildings are dingy inside.  No amenities of any kind.  The website is inaccurate--there is no fitness room.  We feel threatened by the homeless that come onto the property to steal and can smell the exhaust from Sunset during the evening commute.  Not a pleasant place to live.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for reaching out regarding your concerns. Please direct any concerns regarding mask mandates to the office. We appreciate you taking the time to review!

author: Melissa Loomis
review: New (owners?) made my grandma's last days very stressful and miserable; not what she needed with a heart condition for sure. She loved her friends in the building, some of the sweetest neighbors. She wasn't allowed to enjoy the small things

author: Alice King
review: Prompt, fast, friendly service.  Repairs always done to satisfaction.  Thank you for such a good maintenance man.

author: Cheryl Giles
review: The apartments are nice, clean and generally well maintained. The staff are pleasant and professional.  I feel safe.  Enjoy the central location to local community and excellent bus access.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for the wonderful review, Cheryl!
